configurePresets.name: msvc-generator-base
configurePresets.description: Sets the generator for Microsoft Visual Studio builds.

configurePresets.name: msvc-compiler
configurePresets.description: MSVC compiler is selected automatically by the Visual Studio generator.

configurePresets.name: asan-lsan-base
configurePresets.description: Enables AddressSanitizer and LeakSanitizer for GCC/LLVM.

configurePresets.name: tsan-base
configurePresets.description: Enables ThreadSanitizer for GCC/LLVM.

configurePresets.name: ubsan-base
configurePresets.description: Enables UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer (Logic Error Sanitizer) for GCC/LLVM.

configurePresets.name: msvc-asan-base
configurePresets.description: Enables AddressSanitizer for MSVC.

configurePresets.name: dbg
configurePresets.description: Configures a debug build.

configurePresets.name: rdi
configurePresets.description: Configures a release build with debug informations (RelWithDebInfo).

configurePresets.name: rel
configurePresets.description: Configures a basic release build.

configurePresets.name: min
configurePresets.description: Configures a minimum size release build (MinSizeRel).

configurePresets.name: llvm-dbg
configurePresets.description: Configures a debug build with llvm (clang) compiler.

configurePresets.name: llvm-rdi
configurePresets.displayName: Release with Debug Info Build + LLVM (Clang)
configurePresets.description: Configures a release with debug info build with llvm (clang) compiler.

configurePresets.name: llvm-rel
configurePresets.description: Configures a basic release build with llvm (clang) compiler.

configurePresets.name: llvm-min
configurePresets.description: Configures a minimum size release build with llvm (clang) compiler.

configurePresets.name: llvm-dbg-asan
configurePresets.description: Configures a debug build with LLVM and Address/Leak Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: llvm-rdi-asan
configurePresets.description: Configures an RDI build with LLVM and Address/Leak Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: llvm-rel-asan
configurePresets.description: Configures a Release build with LLVM and Address/Leak Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: llvm-dbg-tsan
configurePresets.description: Configures a debug build with LLVM and Thread Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: llvm-rdi-tsan
configurePresets.description: Configures an RDI build with LLVM and Thread Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: llvm-dbg-ubsan
configurePresets.description: Configures a debug build with LLVM and Undefined Behavior Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: llvm-rdi-ubsan
configurePresets.description: Configures an RDI build with LLVM and Undefined Behavior Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: gcc-dbg
configurePresets.description: Configures a debug build with gcc compiler.

configurePresets.name: gcc-rdi
configurePresets.displayName: Release with Debug Info Build + GCC
configurePresets.description: Configures a release with debug info build with gcc compiler.

configurePresets.name: gcc-rel
configurePresets.description: Configures a basic release build with gcc compiler.

configurePresets.name: gcc-min
configurePresets.description: Configures a minimum size release build with gcc compiler.

configurePresets.name: gcc-rdi-asan
configurePresets.description: Configures an RDI build with GCC and Address/Leak Sanitizer.

configurePresets.name: gcc-dbg-tsan

configurePresets.name: gcc-rdi-tsan
